name: tier2_kind_gated_pdf_casual_mention
description: Tier 2 kind-gate (added 2026-06-07): a policy.pdf body that quotes 'CCI-000015' for context (not as a finding) MUST NOT produce a Tier 2 tag. The text-scrape branch of Tier 2 is gated on `evidence.kind in _STRUCTURED_FINDING_KINDS` ({STIG_CKL, STIG_CKLB, STIG_XCCDF, NESSUS}); a .pdf file is routed to EvidenceKind.PDF and the inline `_CCI_RE.finditer(text)` branch short-circuits. The structured `stig_findings` branch above the gate is unaffected — extractors that parse CCI lists out of any kind still tag at 0.95. A regression that removes the gate, widens `_STRUCTURED_FINDING_KINDS` to include `PDF`, or moves the gate above the structured-findings branch kills this case. Recall for policy PDFs is preserved via Tier 1 (doc number, conf 0.9) and Tier 3 (control ID, conf 0.5).

evidence.text: Background: per CCI-000015 above, account management is required. This document does not itself constitute a STIG finding.
